rows.notes: Clear printed year at top centre of page; unambiguous.
Clear, centered title in cursive beneath year; no amounts on the same line.
Small header at top of the amounts column reading 'Brought up.'; text and position are legible.
Large clear three-column amount at top right: '992' in pounds column, '3' in shillings column, '9' in pence column. Description reads as 'Self as Renter' in cursive and is legible.

Three clear numerals '73 2 6' aligned in the three currency columns. Handwriting of description slightly ambiguous on a couple of letters (interpreted as 'Subcurator C R'), but amount alignment is unambiguous.
A single '3' is visible in the pounds column aligned with this description; shillings and pence columns are blank. Description 'Gas Company' is readable though the script is condensed.

Two numerals '80 6' are visible; interpreted as pounds and shillings (pence column blank). The colon after 'Tims' is visible. There is minor ambiguity whether the '6' is in shillings or pence column; based on column alignment relative to clearly three-number rows it best aligns with the shillings column.
A solitary '5' sits in the pounds column next to 'Hollis'. The small size of the figure and surrounding ink makes the reading less certain; chosen reading is pounds only.

rows.description: Wd. Harrison from Mid 1863 to Dec 30/64
rows.notes: Three-column amount '9 13 9' clearly aligned. Description is longer but legible enough to read the abbreviation and dates; amount columns are unambiguous.

This expense line appears as the first line of a bracketed pair. There is no amount written on this specific (upper) line; the bracketed amount appears on the following line. Description is legible; intentionally no separate amount here.

This lower line of a braced group carries the combined amount '15 16' (two numerals visible). Interpreted as £15 and 16s (pence column blank). The bracket clearly groups this and the previous line, so the amount is assigned here. Slight uncertainty because pence column is empty.

rows.description: 19 sets of Rooms not charged last yr.??
rows.notes: Three numerals '2 6 10' aligned in the three columns. Description is partially faded/abbreviated ('Rooms' and ending uncertain) — transcription of text is best-effort. Amount digits are legible and validate (6 shillings <20, 10 pence <12).
Clear three-number amount '15 16 2' aligned to the right. Description 'Byewater' is legible. All currency fields are within valid ranges.
Three-column amount '8 15 4' clearly visible and valid. Description is readable as 'Stringer Props Tax' with moderate clarity.
Amount '34 7 7' is clearly aligned. 'Stratfield Draining' in the description is legible; columns validate.
Large pounds figure '159' with '16' shillings and '4' pence clearly shown. The short description is somewhat stylized ('Warr L. Pew' read from handwriting) but amount placement is unambiguous.
Two-number amount '73 15' present; interpreted as pounds and shillings (pence column blank). Description is legible. Slight uncertainty because pence not shown.
A single '43' is visible next to this description. Handwriting of description is a little unclear ('Shipand' is best-effort). Amount interpreted as pounds only; shillings/pence columns are blank.
Numerals '5 16 2' aligned in the three columns. The first pound digit is small; chosen reading consistent with column alignment. Description reading 'Rowles Improvement' is plausible from the script.
Single '11' visible; description 'J Hill wood for Mill.' readable though compressed. Amount assumed pounds only (shillings/pence blank).
Two-number amount '11 10' visible; interpreted as £11 and 10s. Description 'Glover Room Rent' is legible; pence column empty.
Three-number amount '41 1 2' clearly aligned. Description 'Rose Improvement' legible; all columns within valid ranges.
A single '80' is visible adjacent to this line; likely pounds only. 'Do Pipes' indicates continuation from the previous 'Rose Improvement' line. Slight uncertainty due to size of figure.
Another single '80' appears for this line. Handwritten description is compressed ('Moore Prob: Fellow' is an interpretation). Amount alignment shows pounds only.
Two-number amount '10 10' is visible; interpreted as £10 and 10s. Description 'Price do do' (i.e., Price, ditto) is legible. Pence column blank.
Three-column amount '43 18 6' clearly shown. Description 'Prof. Smith' is readable. All currency fields are valid.
Two-number amount '1 17' is legible; interpreted as £1 17s (pence blank). Description 'Rivington Prize Books' is readable though cramped.

A larger figure '130' appears on this line. The digits are readable but the digit grouping and handwriting make it a little uncertain whether it's '130' or '1 30' — interpreted as £130 (shillings cannot be 30). Therefore pounds=130 assigned; no shillings/pence shown.

rows.description: Attwde & Hower new low shed Morton
rows.notes: Amount '6 17 6' is visible but the description is quite difficult to read; transcription of names is best-effort. Currency fields validate. Slight uncertainty due to faded ink in the description.
Three-column amount '1 16 2' is legible. Description 'Yarnton Tithe Collr' is readable and matches expected form 'Do' entries elsewhere.
Two-number amount '1 5' appears for this line; interpreted as £1 5s. The 'Do' indicates ditto; handwriting is compact but numbers align clearly in pounds and shillings columns.
Two-number amount '17 8' visible; interpreted as £17 8s. Description 'Carriage Chapel' legible. Pence column blank.
Three-number amount '7 11 6' legible and within valid ranges. Description 'Wine Bottles' readable. Good alignment to columns.
Amount '36 16 8' is visible though the first digit is slightly smudged; shillings and pence are clear. Description 'Rowell' short and legible.
Clear '42 16 2' aligned in the three columns. Description 'Nunney' readable; currency fields all valid.
Three-number amount '57 5 6' clearly visible next to the name 'Knowles'. All digits are legible and within valid ranges.
Bottom-right final total clearly written as '2133 18 1' and aligned to the three currency columns. This is the page total and is unambiguous.
